entities.name: FINGER MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop used in the production of composite gluten-free sourdoughs

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop used in the production of composite gluten-free sourdoughs

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop used in the production of composite gluten-free sourdoughs

entities.name: GLUTEN-FREE SOURDOUGH
entities.description: A fermented product made from composite gluten-free flours

entities.name: MICROBIAL DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety and composition of microorganisms present in the sourdoughs

entities.name: PASTING PROPERTIES
entities.description: Rheological parameters of the sourdoughs, including the tendency to retrograde

entities.name: 16S RRNA GENE CLONE LIBRARIES
entities.description: A molecular method used to investigate the microbial diversity of the sourdoughs

entities.name: RAPID VISCOANALYSER
entities.description: An instrument used to measure the pasting properties of the sourdoughs

entities.name: AEROBIC BACTERIA
entities.description: Bacteria that require oxygen for growth, identified in the sourdoughs

entities.name: LACTIC ACID BACTERIA
entities.description: Bacteria that produce lactic acid, identified in the sourdoughs

entities.name: BACILLUS SUBTILIS
entities.description: A specific aerobic bacterium identified in all investigated sourdoughs

entities.name: PEDIOCOCCUS SPP
entities.description: A specific lactic acid bacterium identified in all investigated sourdoughs

entities.name: YEAST
entities.description: Fungi that were not detected in any of the sourdough products

entities.name: PH
entities.description: A measure of acidity in the sourdoughs, ranging from 3.8 to 4.2

entities.name: SPONTANEOUS FERMENTATION
entities.description: The process of fermentation occurring without the addition of a starter culture

entities.name: RETROGRADATION
entities.description: The process of starch molecules rearranging, which affects the staling rate of the product

entities.name: STALING RATE
entities.description: The rate at which the final sourdough product loses freshness

entities.name: WEISELLA SPP
entities.description: A lactic acid bacterium suggested for potential use as a starter culture

entities.name: STARTER CULTURE
entities.description: A preparation of microorganisms used to initiate fermentation in food products
